metadata.title:
NO FEAR FOR


REAL ESTATE

PRESENT RAPID MOVEMENT
WILL CONTINUE, ACCORDING
TO DEALERS ESTIMATE OF
THE OUTLOOK.

pages.raw_text:
The real estate outlook, backed
by the fact that during the past
summer there had been more trans.
fers than ever before in the city S
history, is particularly bright just
now, according to g. A. Yancey.
Il am finding sales easily made
and predict that the present move
ment will continue for a long
time yet" asserted Mr.. Yancey.


Other dealers also report things
moving readily. DR.. p. S. Byrne
declared that he does not intend
making any great effort to dispose
of lots in Lidgerwood addition just
at present. He has just finished
disposing Of Byrne addition of GAO
lots, the entire addition selling in
less than four months at an aver
age price of 1925 a lot.
